mapper.select: select id, username, password, real_name, role, status, violation_count_month, violation_month, booking_banned_until, phone, email, create_time, update_time from sys_user where username = #{username} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, real_name, role, status, phone, email, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{role}, #{status}, #{phone}, #{email}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select id, username, password, real_name, role, status, violation_count_month, violation_month, booking_banned_until, phone, email, create_time, update_time from sys_user where id = #{id} limit 1

select id, username, password, real_name, role, status, violation_count_month, violation_month, booking_banned_until, phone, email, create_time, update_time from sys_user order by create_time desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update sys_user set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_user set violation_count_month = #{violationCountMonth}, violation_month = #{violationMonth}, booking_banned_until = #{bookingBannedUntil}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select permission_code from sys_role_permission where role = #{role}
